@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個以單一台股為核心的指標驅動研究網站，展示 AI analyst 如何透過正式會議完成訊號評估、風格切換與決策整合。 Taiwan Stock Radar is an indicator-driven website for single-stock Taiwan equity analysis through formal multi-agent signal review and style adaptation.

@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個開源台股 AI research skill，會讓多位 specialist AI analyst 對同一檔股票開會，完成訊號引擎評估、風格切換、策略選擇與操作計畫。 Taiwan Stock Radar is an open-source Taiwan equity research skill that runs a specialist AI committee around one stock and returns signal-engine review, style adaptation, strategy selection, action zones, and invalidation rules.
